notes:
Performance: Runs at 40-60 FPS with Vulkan. Using Wine D3d11 resulted in 20-40 FPS.

Problems: In full-screen mode the mouse stops working in menus sometimes. Alt-tabbing results in mouse working in the menus but not in first person mode. The full-screen doesn't capture the mouse after alt-tabbing.
On some occasions the character starts spinning while looking up or down (when body-inspect and backpack were open together). Restarting the game fixes this. 

Otherwise everything seems to work like intended.
title: Green Hell

notes: The game runs great at first with full graphics, but then it gets slower after about 10-20 minutes of playtime. Reloading fixes it. There is also some clipping on some textures, black flickering as well. Id's say it's playable, if you can save in time before the lag gets too bad. Also had one random crash with a defunct process remaining.
title: Green Hell

notes: Mouse glitched after either cut scene or Alt-Tabing, either having spinny world and mouse in menu or normal world and no mouse in menu. Restart always fixed this. Up to day 3 (30 mins playtime, noob, getting to know the gameplay) and has happened twice.
title: Green Hell

notes: I originally posted saying that restart fixes mouse issue, but if you alt tab while in menu, the menu mouse gets fixed but stuffs the world mouse, and if you alt tab while in world, the world mouse gets fixed but stuffs the menu mouse.
title: Green Hell

cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Works fine out of the box. There are some mouse issues after ALT-TAB and once in a while it appears that the mouse cursor does stop working at all. This can be fixed by ALT-TAB but may result in the aforementioned mouse bug... however, it at least allows saving the game.
title: Green Hell

notes: As previously stated, the mouse ran crazy after about an hour. I haven't tested so much to fix it. The game however runs smooth and nice. Do not think it goes much better right now in early access.
title: Green Hell

notes: Had and issue with 'alt+tab' in alpha version. Have no 'alt-tab' issue since 1.0. New issue is the black screen in the end of story mode. Have 50-60 fps (high settings).
title: Green Hell

gpu: ATI Technologies Inc. AMD Radeon R9 390
notes: Just disabled Esync. Since version 1.03 of Green Hell you have to skip the tutorial to avoid the black screen bug.
title: Green Hell
